TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Peter_M_Christian, title = Peter_M_Christian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peter_M_Christian} }

S.FORM: Peter M. Christian ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Peter M. Christian, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1947) mrhuw Micronesia ta' misuw hya' ga Peter M. Christian, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Peter M. Christian ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Peter M. Christian, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1947) mrhuw Micronesia ta' misuw hya' ga Peter M. Christian, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: peter m. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, peter m. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw miʦ~ʨrones~ɕia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa peter m. ʦ~ʨħris~ɕtian, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
